Caterpillar ·Engine

Caterpillar 3406C-DITA

Spare parts reference for the Caterpillar 3406C-DITA marine diesel – pistons, valves, bearings, fuel system, cooling, and overhaul components. OEM and aftermarket options available on request.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
